name: I talked to the insurance adjuster already after my injury, did I mess up?

mainEntity.name: I talked to the insurance adjuster already after my injury, did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Proceed carefully; lawyer up before more talks.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Not necessarily, but be cautious—adjusters seek statements to deny claims; don't admit fault or downplay injuries.[3][7] Delays or vague talks hurt proof.[3] Key factors: Stick to facts (how/when/where); record calls if legal; avoid recorded statements without counsel.[7] Practical guidance: Politely end talks, consult a lawyer before more contact, and focus on medical records. Professionals handle negotiations.

description: Proceed carefully; lawyer up before more talks.[3]
